heading: Create a Vector Search Index
body:
Open [mongosh](mongodb-shell) in a terminal window and connect to your Atlas
cluster. For detailed instructions on connecting, see
[MongoDB Shell](connect-mongo-shell).

```shell
mongosh "mongodb://localhost:27017"
```

> **Example:** **Input:**
>
> ```shell
> use sample_mflix
> ```
>
> **Output:**
>
> ```shell
> switched to db sample_mflix
> ```

You can create an index of `autoEmbed` type to run natural language
queries.

```shell
db.movies.createSearchIndex(
  "vector_index", 
  "vectorSearch", 
  {
    "fields": [
      {
        "type": "autoEmbed",
        "modality": "text",
        "path": "fullplot",
        "model": "voyage-4"
      }
    ]
  }
);
```

This index definition:

- Indexes the `fullplot` field as the `autoEmbed`
  [autoEmbed](avs-types-auto-embed). This field contains text
  that represent the summary of a movie's plot.

- Uses `voyage-4` embedding model to generate the vector
  embeddings for the `fullplot` field.
